calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Will Chen, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Tina Jurnigen, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Winterland San Francisco Partner.
Alan Horwitz representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Greg August is present.
Karin Krattli representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 2000 Post Street Apartment #234 San Francisco California 94115.

This case settled, the trial date of April 1, 2008 is vacated.

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Denied

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Denied
